metadata.description: Self-serve wealth management skills for Claude Code and Claude Cowork

plugins.name: lea-test-plugin
plugins.description: LEA Skills for Wealth Management -- overview of available skills, supported platforms, and how to get started

plugins.name: box-client-file-inventory
plugins.description: Takes inventory of your Box vault — every file across all client and household folders, organized by document type (agreements, tax docs, statements, and more). Generates an HTML report you can open in your browser with one click.

plugins.name: box-client-agreement-organizer
plugins.description: Finds client agreements (CAs, IMAs, IPSs, CEAs) across your Box vault. Coverage report + optional organize to a central folder.

plugins.name: sharepoint-client-file-inventory
plugins.description: Takes inventory of your SharePoint vault — every file across all client and household folders, organized by document type.

plugins.name: sharepoint-client-agreement-organizer
plugins.description: Finds client agreements across your SharePoint vault. Coverage report + optional organize.

plugins.name: egnyte-client-file-inventory
plugins.description: Takes inventory of your Egnyte vault — every file across all client and household folders, organized by document type.

plugins.name: egnyte-client-agreement-organizer
plugins.description: Finds client agreements across your Egnyte vault. Coverage report + optional organize.

plugins.name: wealthbox-data-completeness-audit
plugins.description: Scan your Wealthbox CRM for missing and incomplete contact data. Generates an interactive report with completeness scores, field coverage, and CSV export.

plugins.name: practifi-data-completeness-audit
plugins.description: Scan your Practifi CRM for missing and incomplete contact data. Generates an interactive report with completeness scores, field coverage, and CSV export.

plugins.name: wealthbox-agreement-compliance
plugins.description: Cross-reference Wealthbox households with your document vault (Box, SharePoint, or Egnyte) to find which clients are missing required agreements. Compliance gap report with CSV export.

plugins.name: practifi-agreement-compliance
plugins.description: Cross-reference Practifi households with your document vault (Box, SharePoint, or Egnyte) to find which clients are missing required agreements. Compliance gap report with CSV export.
